apiProof.note: API returns renderable inventory but snapshot is ~11h old on disk; frontend fix ensures UI renders API/last-good data and rejects stale empty status overwrites.

frontendRootCause: mergePreservedInventorySnapshot treated provenEmptyInventory before row counts and could ignore real fish rows
status-only account-status merges could overwrite leaderstats while preserving fish but liveSnapshot.playerStats stayed null
getEntryPlayerStats only read liveSnapshot.playerStats, not lastData.playerStats from get-backpack
buildLiveSnapshotFromPayload did not resolve inventory via resolveEntryPublicSnapshot
no timestamp-aware shouldReplaceCurrentSnapshot allowed older empty heartbeats to win timestamps
frontendFix: pollUser fetch uses credentials same-origin + no-store
